title: Looking for Category Manager at Rapido

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Rapido
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!
